issues.title: spring-ai-zhipuai POST api timeout
issues.body:
**Bug description**
```
 @GetMapping("genFieldList")
    public String genFieldList(@RequestParam String func) {
//        ChatClient chatClient = chatModelProvider.getChatClient();
        ChatClient chatClient = ChatClient.create(zhiPuAiChatModel);
        String prompt = """
                   你的任务是根据功能描述为{func}的输入来生成实现该功能需要的字段信息列表，满足一般信息系统实现该功能的字段需求。
                   ## 信息包含：
                 英文标识（code）：英文标识由字母+下划线组成。含义尽量与输入的含义接近，非必要的话尽量使用一个简洁单词描述。
                 字段描述(discription)：生成一段描述该字段含义的描述。简短，不超过20个字。
                 字段类型(type)：判断字段最可能使用的类型。类型包括ID(主键),SINGLE_TEXT(单行文本),MULTI_TEXT(多行文本),INTEGER(整数),FRACTIONAL(小数),DATETIME("日期时间"),DATE("日期"),TIME("时间"),BOOLEAN("布尔值"),RICH_TEXT("富文本"),RELATIONSHIP("关联关系"),IMAGE("图片"),FILE("文件"),ENUM("枚举"),CREATE_TIME("创建时间"),CREATE_BY("创建人"),UPDATE_TIME("更新时间"),UPDATE_BY("更新人"),VERSION("版本号"),DELETED("软删除",),TENANT_ID("租户ID")。
                 ## 生成字段信息结果示例
                 功能描述为：管理学生基本信息的表
                 生成字段信息结果：["name":"主键","code":"id","discription":"学生唯一ID", "type":"ID"],["name":"年龄","code":"age","discription":"年龄", "type":"INTEGER"]。          
                """;
        List<FieldFillingDto> fieldFillingDtoList = chatClient.prompt()
                // 输入单条提示词
                .user(u -> u.text(prompt)
                        .params(Map.of("func", func)))
                // call代表非流式问答，返回的结果可以是ChatResponse，也可以是Entity（转成java类型），也可以是字符串直接提取回答结果。
                .call()
                .entity(new ParameterizedTypeReference<List<FieldFillingDto>>() {
                });
        return fieldFillingDtoList.toString()
                ;
    }
```


error

**Environment**
Please provide as many details as possible: Spring AI version, Java version, which vector store you use if any, etc

**Steps to reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the issue.

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Minimal Complete Reproducible example**
Please provide a failing test or a minimal complete verifiable example that reproduces the issue.
Bug reports that are reproducible will take priority in resolution over reports that are not reproducible.

comments.body: hi, @q651742112 the problem be reproduced? judging from the error stack, it's purely a network issue?
@q651742112 closing this as a network issue and not a problem within Spring AI. If you have more details that show otherwise please reopen and provide them here.
